message:
🌱 Replace 15 duplicate formatRelativeTime with shared formatTimeAgo (#10080)

Remove identical formatRelativeTime implementations from 15 card status
files (cni, linkerd, volcano, cortex, envoy, grpc, kubevela, dapr,
strimzi, openfga, openfeature, spiffe, wasmcloud, kserve,
cloud_custodian). All now import formatTimeAgo from lib/formatters.ts.

Also removes per-file time constants (RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS,
MINUTES_PER_HOUR, HOURS_PER_DAY) that were only used by the removed
functions. kubevela_status retains MINUTES_PER_HOUR for its formatAge
helper.

Net reduction: ~277 lines of duplicated logic.
Zero behavior changes — all implementations produced identical output.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@ import { MetricTile } from '../../../lib/cards/CardComponents' import { Skeleton, SkeletonList, SkeletonStats } from '../../ui/Skeleton' import { useCachedCni } from '../../../hooks/useCachedCni' import type { CniNodeState, CniNodeStatus } from '../../../lib/demo/cni' +import { formatTimeAgo } from '../../../lib/formatters' // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Named constants (no magic numbers) @@ -38,32 +39,12 @@ const SKELETON_BADGE_WIDTH = 90 const SKELETON_BADGE_HEIGHT = 20 const SKELETON_LIST_ITEMS = 5 -const RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS = 60_000 -const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 -const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24 - const MAX_NODES_DISPLAYED = 6 // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Helpers // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -function formatRelativeTime(isoString: string): string { - const parsed = new Date(isoString).getTime() - if (!isoString || Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 'just now' - - const diff = Date.now() - parsed - if (diff < 0) return 'just now' - - const hour = MINUTES_PER_HOUR * RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS - const day = HOURS_PER_DAY * hour - - if (diff < RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS) return 'just now' - if (diff < hour) return `${Math.floor(diff / RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS)}m ago` - if (diff < day) return `${Math.floor(diff / hour)}h ago` - return `${Math.floor(diff / day)}d ago` -} - const NODE_STATE_CLASS_MAP: Record = { 'ready': 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400', 'not-ready': 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400', @@ -178,7 +159,7 @@ export function CniStatus() {
- {formatRelativeTime(data.lastCheckTime)} + {formatTimeAgo(data.lastCheckTime)}

@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@ import type { KubeVelaAppStatus, WorkflowStepPhase, } from './demoData' +import { formatTimeAgo } from '../../../lib/formatters' // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Named constants (no magic numbers) @@ -48,38 +49,19 @@ const SKELETON_BADGE_WIDTH = 90 const SKELETON_BADGE_HEIGHT = 20 const SKELETON_LIST_ITEMS = 4 -const RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS = 60_000 -const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 -const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24 - const PERCENT_FULL = 100 const PROGRESS_BAR_WIDTH_PX = 56 const PROGRESS_BAR_HEIGHT_PX = 4 const MAX_APPS_DISPLAYED = 5 +const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 const AGE_MINUTES_HOUR_THRESHOLD = 60 const AGE_MINUTES_DAY_THRESHOLD = 1440 // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Helpers // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -function formatRelativeTime(isoString: string): string { - const parsed = new Date(isoString).getTime() - if (!isoString || Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 'just now' - - const diff = Date.now() - parsed - if (diff < 0) return 'just now' - - const hour = MINUTES_PER_HOUR * RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS - const day = HOURS_PER_DAY * hour - - if (diff < RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS) return 'just now' - if (diff < hour) return `${Math.floor(diff / RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS)}m ago` - if (diff < day) return `${Math.floor(diff / hour)}h ago` - return `${Math.floor(diff / day)}d ago` -} - function formatAge(ageMinutes: number): string { if (ageMinutes < AGE_MINUTES_HOUR_THRESHOLD) return `${ageMinutes}m` if (ageMinutes < AGE_MINUTES_DAY_THRESHOLD) { @@ -362,7 +344,7 @@ export function KubeVelaStatus() { - {formatRelativeTime(data.lastCheckTime)} + {formatTimeAgo(data.lastCheckTime)}

@@ -34,6 +34,7 @@ import type { OpenfgaStore, OpenfgaStoreStatus, } from './demoData' +import { formatTimeAgo } from '../../../lib/formatters' // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Named constants (no magic numbers) @@ -45,10 +46,6 @@ const SKELETON_BADGE_WIDTH = 90 const SKELETON_BADGE_HEIGHT = 20 const SKELETON_LIST_ITEMS = 5 -const RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS = 60_000 -const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 -const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24 - const MAX_STORES_DISPLAYED = 5 const MAX_MODELS_DISPLAYED = 5 @@ -59,22 +56,6 @@ const NUMBER_LOCALE = 'en-US' // Helpers // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -function formatRelativeTime(isoString: string): string { - const parsed = new Date(isoString).getTime() - if (!isoString || Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 'just now' - - const diff = Date.now() - parsed - if (diff < 0) return 'just now' - - const hour = MINUTES_PER_HOUR * RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS - const day = HOURS_PER_DAY * hour - - if (diff < RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS) return 'just now' - if (diff < hour) return `${Math.floor(diff / RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS)}m ago` - if (diff < day) return `${Math.floor(diff / hour)}h ago` - return `${Math.floor(diff / day)}d ago` -} - function formatNumber(value: number): string { return value.toLocaleString(NUMBER_LOCALE) } @@ -112,7 +93,7 @@ function StoreRow({ store }: { store: OpenfgaStore }) { {formatNumber(store.tupleCount)} tuples · {store.modelCount} models - {formatRelativeTime(store.lastWriteTime)} + {formatTimeAgo(store.lastWriteTime)} @@ -138,7 +119,7 @@ function ModelRow({ model }: { model: OpenfgaAuthorizationModel }) { {model.storeName} · {model.typeCount} types - {formatRelativeTime(model.createdAt)} + {formatTimeAgo(model.createdAt)} @@ -232,7 +213,7 @@ export function OpenfgaStatus() {

@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ import type { SpiffeFederatedDomain, SpiffeRegistrationEntry, } from './demoData' +import { formatTimeAgo } from '../../../lib/formatters' // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Named constants (no magic numbers) @@ -43,9 +44,6 @@ const SKELETON_BADGE_WIDTH = 90 const SKELETON_BADGE_HEIGHT = 20 const SKELETON_LIST_ITEMS = 5 -const RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS = 60_000 -const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 -const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24 const SECONDS_PER_MINUTE = 60 const SECONDS_PER_HOUR = 3600 const SECONDS_PER_DAY = 86400 @@ -56,22 +54,6 @@ const MAX_ENTRIES_DISPLAYED = 5 // Helpers // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -function formatRelativeTime(isoString: string): string { - const parsed = new Date(isoString).getTime() - if (!isoString || Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 'just now' - - const diff = Date.now() - parsed - if (diff < 0) return 'just now' - - const hour = MINUTES_PER_HOUR * RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS - const day = HOURS_PER_DAY * hour - - if (diff < RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS) return 'just now' - if (diff < hour) return `${Math.floor(diff / RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS)}m ago` - if (diff < day) return `${Math.floor(diff / hour)}h ago` - return `${Math.floor(diff / day)}d ago` -} - function formatTtl(seconds: number): string { if (seconds >= SECONDS_PER_DAY) { return `${Math.floor(seconds / SECONDS_PER_DAY)}d` @@ -222,7 +204,7 @@ export function SpiffeStatus() {
- {formatRelativeTime(data.lastCheckTime)} + {formatTimeAgo(data.lastCheckTime)}

@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ import type { StrimziConsumerGroup, StrimziKafkaCluster, } from './demoData' +import { formatTimeAgo } from '../../../lib/formatters' // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Named constants (no magic numbers) @@ -46,10 +47,6 @@ const SKELETON_BADGE_WIDTH = 90 const SKELETON_BADGE_HEIGHT = 20 const SKELETON_LIST_ITEMS = 4 -const RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS = 60_000 -const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 -const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24 - // Max clusters to show in the list view before we rely on scroll. const MAX_CLUSTERS_DISPLAYED = 6 // Max consumer groups shown per cluster row (highest lag first). @@ -66,22 +63,6 @@ const LAG_CRITICAL_THRESHOLD = 1_000 // Helpers // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -function formatRelativeTime(isoString: string): string { - const parsed = new Date(isoString).getTime() - if (!isoString || Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 'just now' - - const diff = Date.now() - parsed - if (diff < 0) return 'just now' - - const hour = MINUTES_PER_HOUR * RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS - const day = HOURS_PER_DAY * hour - - if (diff < RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS) return 'just now' - if (diff < hour) return `${Math.floor(diff / RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS)}m ago` - if (diff < day) return `${Math.floor(diff / hour)}h ago` - return `${Math.floor(diff / day)}d ago` -} - const CLUSTER_HEALTH_CLASS: Record = { healthy: 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400', degraded: 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400', @@ -262,7 +243,7 @@ export function StrimziStatus() {
- {formatRelativeTime(data.lastCheckTime)} + {formatTimeAgo(data.lastCheckTime)}

@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ import type { WasmcloudProvider, WasmcloudProviderStatus, } from './demoData' +import { formatTimeAgo } from '../../../lib/formatters' // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- // Named constants (no magic numbers) @@ -46,9 +47,6 @@ const SKELETON_BADGE_WIDTH = 90 const SKELETON_BADGE_HEIGHT = 20 const SKELETON_LIST_ITEMS = 5 -const RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS = 60_000 -const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60 -const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24 const SECONDS_PER_MINUTE = 60 const SECONDS_PER_HOUR = 3600 const SECONDS_PER_DAY = 86400 @@ -63,22 +61,6 @@ const HOST_ID_SHORT_LENGTH = 8 // Helpers // --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -function formatRelativeTime(isoString: string): string { - const parsed = new Date(isoString).getTime() - if (!isoString || Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 'just now' - - const diff = Date.now() - parsed - if (diff < 0) return 'just now' - - const hour = MINUTES_PER_HOUR * RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS - const day = HOURS_PER_DAY * hour - - if (diff < RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS) return 'just now' - if (diff < hour) return `${Math.floor(diff / RELATIVE_TIME_MINUTE_MS)}m ago` - if (diff < day) return `${Math.floor(diff / hour)}h ago` - return `${Math.floor(diff / day)}d ago` -} - function formatUptime(seconds: number): string { if (seconds >= SECONDS_PER_DAY) { return `${Math.floor(seconds / SECONDS_PER_DAY)}d` @@ -275,7 +257,7 @@ export function WasmcloudStatus() {
- {formatRelativeTime(data.lastCheckTime)} + {formatTimeAgo(data.lastCheckTime)}
